ground_truth.title: Seattle Event Management & Planning · Event Coordinator & Rentals
ground_truth.main_content: Event Management & Planning for Intimate Gatherings to Large-scale Seattle Celebrations. Services include Event Vision, Design, and Layout; Day of Event Management, Production and Logistics; Vendor Management including Contracts and Billing; Event Staffing and Management; Event Parking and Transportation; Permitting and Handling of Municipal Regulations; Venue Reservation and Logistics; Complete Supply and Event Rentals. Planning an event can take an incredible amount of time to get all of the details perfect. If you are hosting your next event in the greater Seattle area, you can bring 35 years of industry experience to your next convention, corporate conference, or celebration. Working with National Event Pros you call the shots—from full event production down to simple rentals and staff, you choose the extent of the relationship. Seattle is one of the most beautiful cities in the Northwest, and home to so many unique event locations. A National Event Pro event coordinator will help you plan and execute the event of your dreams, while accomplishing all of your objectives. Endless Seattle Venues. The basis of any great event is a fantastic location. Choosing a space that can host all of your guests, entertainment, and activities can sometimes turn from fun to a troublesome challenge. Fortunately, in such a diverse, large area as Seattle, there are an incredible amount of options for small gatherings, all the way to conventions with thousands of attendees. We've worked with Corporate giants to turn Safeco Field and CenturyLink Field into evening of adventure. Turn the Snoqualmie tubing pass into a German-themed snow day—complete with Schnitzel and Beer. Seattle's iconic pier locations make for great waterfront receptions to end a long conference week. Whatever event or location you have in mind, National Event Pros will work to secure your Venue choice and transform the space into your ideal experience. Locally Sourced Seattle Event Rentals. Being headquartered in Seattle, National Event Pros maintains a massive inventory of Photo Booths, Tents, Extreme Attractions, Concessions, and so many more event rentals. Choose from unique interactive event rentals like Giant Lite-Brite or Giant Pac-Man. Rent bleeding edge technologies such as full motion VR Simulators. When you need event rentals, you need the peace of mind that your equipment will be functional, clean, and insured. Professional Seattle Event Management & Staffing Services. Once you've completed all of the pre-planning for your event, there is still the critical moment of executing it. One of the most important factors is making sure that every guest interaction is a great one. The staff that are present at your event can either assist you or destroy you in that goal. We hire and train all of our internal team to be able to provide the best experience possible. With focus on punctuality, appearance, guest interaction, safety, and equipment knowledge, we leave nothing to chance. Make sure your Seattle event has a solid staffing plan in place.

items.caption: Axis Pioneer Square - 6000 square feet of the historic 1889 Globe Building in legendary Pioneer Square with 18' brick arch walls
Emerald City Trapeze - Almost 20,000 square feet of functional, flexible, and visually stunning gathering space in Seattle's SODO district
Novelty Hill – Januik Winery - Unique, upscale destination venue in Woodinville's wine country
Floor 13 - Beautiful, modern, versatile loft space with industrial charm of exposed brick and beams
HTC Vive VR Stations - Take your gaming experience to the next level with the latest in virtual reality gaming
Dual Mobile Zip Line - The ultimate extreme attraction! Washington's only mobile zip line from a 30-ft tower
Classic Arcade Games - Wide variety of arcade classics including Asteroids, Donkey Kong, Pac-Man
Virtual Graffiti Wall - Artistic take on a traditional photo booth for trade shows, weddings, or corporate events
Giant Beer Pong - Classic party game brought to life in a larger than life way
